title: Disqualification: debarred entities
text: if the issuer, any of its promoters, promoter group or directors or selling shareholders are debarred from accessing the capital market by the Board.
notes: Map to is_debarred for issuer, promoters, promoter group, directors, selling shareholders.

source.span_hint: if the issuer, any of its promoters, promoter group or directors or selling shareholders are debarred

title: Disqualification: promoter/director of debarred company
text: if any of the promoters or directors of the issuer is a promoter or director of any other company which is debarred from accessing the capital market by the Board.
notes: Add a relational check (director cross-links to debarred companies).

source.span_hint: if any of the promoters or directors of the issuer is a promoter or director of any other company which is debarred

title: Disqualification: wilful defaulter or fraudulent borrower
text: if the issuer or any of its promoters or directors is a wilful defaulter or a fraudulent borrower.
notes: Map to is_fraudulent or is_wilful_defaulter.

source.span_hint: if the issuer or any of its promoters or directors is a wilful defaulter or a fraudulent borrower

title: Eligibility: no outstanding convertibles/rights
text: An issuer shall not be eligible to make an initial public offer if there are any outstanding convertible securities or any other right which would entitle any person with any option to receive equity shares of the issuer.
notes: Carve-outs for ESOP, SAR, and convertible securities as per provided that clause.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall not be eligible to make an initial public offer if there are any outstanding convertible securities

title: Eligibility: net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr
text: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, in each of the preceding three full years, of which not more than fifty per cent. are held in monetary assets: Provided that if more than fifty per cent. of the net tangible assets are held in monetary assets, the issuer has utilised or made firm commitments to utilise such excess monetary assets in its business or project; Provided further that the limit of fifty per cent. on monetary assets shall not be applicable in case the initial public offer is made entirely through an offer for sale.
notes: Map to net_tangible_assets ≥ 3cr, with conditions on monetary assets

source.reg: Eligibility requirements for an initial public offer 6. (1)
source.span_hint: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore

title: Eligibility: shares acquired via court/tribunal schemes
text: if the equity shares offered for sale were acquired pursuant to any scheme approved by a High Court 34[***] or approved by a tribunal or the Central Government under the sections 230 to 234 of Companies Act, 2013, as applicable, in lieu of business and invested capital which had been in existence for a period of more than one year prior to approval of such scheme;
notes: Map to share acquisition history and approval requirements.

source.span_hint: if the equity shares offered for sale were acquired

title: Eligibility: bonus issue conditions
text: if the equity shares offered for sale were issued under a bonus issue on securities held for a period of at least one year prior to the filing of the draft offer document with the Board and further subject to the following:
notes: Main condition for bonus issues; map to shareholding and reserve requirements.

source.span_hint: if the equity shares offered for sale were issued

title: Disqualification: fully paid-up convertible securities to be converted
text: fully paid-up outstanding convertible securities which are required to be converted on or before the date of filing of the red herring prospectus (in case of book-built issues) or the prospectus (in case of fixed price issues), as the case may be.
notes: Map to has_outstanding_convertibles

source.reg: Eligibility requirements for an initial public offer
source.span_hint: fully paid-up outstanding convertible securities

title: Eligibility: name change with 50% revenue from new activity
text: if it has changed its name within the last one year, at least fifty per cent. of the revenue, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, for the preceding one full year has been earned by it from the activity indicated by its new name.
notes: Map to has_name_change with revenue_condition ≥ 50%

source.reg: Eligibility requirements for an initial public offer 6. (1)
source.span_hint: if it has changed its name within the last one year

title: Eligibility: book-building with 75% QIB allocation
text: An issuer not satisfying the condition stipulated in sub-regulation (1) shall be eligible to make an initial public offer only if the issue is made through the book-building process and the issuer undertakes to allot at least seventy five per cent. of the net offer to qualified institutional buyers and to refund the full subscription money if it fails to do so.
notes: Map to uses_book_building and allocates_75_to_QIB

source.reg: Eligibility requirements for an initial public offer 6. (1)
source.span_hint: An issuer not satisfying the condition stipulated

title: Listing application to stock exchanges
text: it has made an application to one or more stock exchanges to seek an in-principle approval for listing of its specified securities on such stock exchanges and has chosen one of them as the designated stock exchange, in terms of Schedule XIX;
notes: Map to has_stock_exchange_listing_approval.

source.span_hint: it has made an application to one or more stock exchanges

title: Depository agreement for dematerialisation
text: it has entered into an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation of the specified securities already issued and proposed to be issued;
notes: Map to has_depository_agreement.

source.span_hint: it has entered into an agreement with a depository

title: Promoters' securities dematerialised
text: all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form prior to filing of the offer document;
notes: Map to promoters_securities_dematerialised prior to filing.

source.span_hint: all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form

title: Partly paid-up equity shares fully paid or forfeited
text: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up or have been forfeited;
notes: Map to partly_paid_shares_status (fully paid or forfeited).

source.span_hint: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up

title: Finance arrangements for 75%
text: it has made firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means towards seventy five per cent. of the stated means of finance for a specific project proposed to be funded from the issue proceeds, excluding the amount to be raised through the proposed public issue or through existing identifiable internal accruals.
notes: Map to has_75_percent_finance_arrangements for a specific project.

source.span_hint: it has made firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means

title: SR equity shares issued prior and held for 3 months
text: The SR equity shares have been issued prior to the filing of the draft red herring prospectus and held for a period of at least three months prior to the filing of the red herring prospectus;
notes: Map to issuance_date and holding_period >= 3 months.

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares have been issued prior to the filing

title: SR equity shares voting rights ratio
text: The SR equity shares shall have voting rights in the ratio of a minimum of 2:1 upto a maximum of 10:1 compared to ordinary shares and such ratio shall be in whole numbers only;
notes: Map to voting_rights_ratio between 2:1 and 10:1 in whole numbers.

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares shall have voting rights in the ratio

title: SR equity shares equivalent except voting
text: The SR equity shares shall be equivalent to ordinary equity shares in all respects, except for having superior voting rights.
notes: Map to equivalence with ordinary shares except voting rights.

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares shall be equivalent to ordinary equity shares

title: Holding period at least one year
text: Only such fully paid-up equity shares may be offered for sale to the public, which have been held by the sellers for a period of at least one year prior to the filing of the draft offer document.
notes: Map to holding_period >= 1 year

source.reg: Additional conditions for an offer for sale
source.span_hint: Only such fully paid-up equity shares may be offered for sale to the public, which have been held by the sellers for a period of at least one year

title: Exception for converted shares
text: Provided that in case the equity shares received on conversion or exchange of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities including depository receipts are being offered for sale, the holding period of such convertible securities, including depository receipts, as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of one year period referred in this sub-regulation.
notes: Holding period includes convertible securities if applicable

source.reg: Additional conditions for an offer for sale
source.span_hint: Provided that in case the equity shares received on conversion or exchange

title: Compliance at filing time
text: Provided further that such holding period of one year shall be required to be complied with at the time of filing of the draft offer document.
notes: Must comply with holding period at draft offer filing

source.reg: Additional conditions for an offer for sale
source.span_hint: Provided further that such holding period of one year shall be required to be complied with

title: Limit on general corporate purposes funding
text: general corporate purposes, and shall not exceed thirty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer
notes: Map to max_funding_for_general_purposes = 35%

source.span_hint: general corporate purposes shall not exceed thirty five per cent

title: Limit on untargeted acquisition/investment funding
text: such objects where the issuer company has not identified acquisition or investment target, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document, shall not exceed thirty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer
notes: Map to max_funding_for_untargeted_objects = 35% unless conditions met

source.span_hint: such objects shall not exceed thirty five per cent

title: Reduced limit for untargeted objects
text: the amount raised for such objects where the issuer company has not identified acquisition or investment target, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document, shall not exceed twenty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer
notes: Map to max_funding_for_untargeted_objects = 25% under certain conditions

source.span_hint: the amount raised for such objects shall not exceed twenty five per cent

title: Exception to limits if acquisition identified
text: such limits shall not apply if the proposed acquisition or strategic investment object has been identified and suitable specific disclosures about such acquisitions or investments are made in the draft offer document and the offer document at the time of filing of offer documents
notes: Map to if acquisition_identified and disclosures_made

source.span_hint: such limits shall not apply if the proposed acquisition or strategic investment object has been identified

title: Exceptions to holding period requirement
text: the requirement of holding equity shares for a period of one year shall not apply: a) in case of an offer for sale of a government company or statutory authority or corporation or any special purpose vehicle set up and controlled by any one or more of them, which is engaged in the infrastructure sector; b) if the equity shares offered for sale were acquired pursuant to any scheme approved by a High Court or approved by a tribunal or the Central Government under the sections 230 to 234 of Companies Act, 2013, as applicable, in lieu of business and invested capital which had been in existence for a period of more than one year prior to approval of such scheme; c) if the equity shares offered for sale were issued under a bonus issue on securities held for a period of at least one year prior to the filing of the draft offer document with the Board and further subject to the following: (i) such specified securities being issued out of free reserves and share premium existing in the books of account as at the end of the financial year preceding the financial year in which the draft offer document is filed with the Board; and (ii) such equity shares not being issued by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealized profits of the issuer
notes: Map to exceptions for infrastructure companies, scheme-acquired shares, bonus issues with conditions

source.span_hint: shall not apply: a) in case of an offer for sale of a government company

title: Maximum sale for large shareholders
text: shares offered for sale to the public by shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, more than twenty per cent of pre-issue shareholding of the issuer based on fully diluted basis, shall not exceed more than fifty per cent of their pre-issue shareholding on fully diluted basis
notes: Map to max_sale_percentage for shareholders with >20% stake

source.span_hint: shares offered for sale to the public by shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, more than twenty per cent of pre-issue shareholding

title: Maximum sale for small shareholders
text: shares offered for sale to the public by shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, less than twenty per cent of pre-issue shareholding of the issuer based on fully diluted basis, shall not exceed more than ten per cent of pre-issue shareholding of the issuer on fully diluted basis
notes: Map to max_sale_percentage for shareholders with <20% stake

source.span_hint: shares offered for sale to the public by shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, less than twenty per cent of pre-issue shareholding

title: Bonus issue: securities from free reserves
text: such specified securities being issued out of free reserves and share premium existing in the books of account as at the end of the financial year preceding the financial year in which the draft offer document is filed with the Board;
notes: Map to reserve usage; ensure securities from free reserves and share premium.

source.span_hint: such specified securities being issued out of free reserves

title: Bonus issue: not from revaluation/unrealized reserves
text: such equity shares not being issued by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealized profits of the issuer.
notes: Map to reserve constraints; exclude revaluation and unrealized profits.

source.span_hint: such equity shares not being issued by utilisation

title: Lock-in requirements for >20% shareholders
text: for shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, more than twenty per cent of pre-issue shareholding of the issuer based on fully diluted basis, provisions of lock-in as specified under regulation 17 of these regulations shall be applicable, and relaxation from lock-in as provided under clause (c) of regulation 17 of these regulations shall not be applicable.
notes: Map to lock-in periods; enforce lock-in for large shareholders.

source.span_hint: for shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons

title: Eligibility for convertible debt IPO
text: An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments even without making a prior public issue of its equity shares and listing thereof. Provided that it is not in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount in respect of debt instruments issued by it to the public, if any, for a period of more than six months.
notes: Map to issuer eligibility; check for no debt defaults.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer

title: Additional conditions for convertible debt IPO
text: In addition to other requirements laid down in these regulations, an issuer making an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments shall also comply with the following conditions:
notes: Main header for conditions; map to compliance checks.

source.span_hint: In addition to other requirements laid down in these regulations

title: Debenture trustee appointment
text: it has appointed at least one debenture trustee in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees) Regulations, 1993;
notes: Map to trustee requirements; ensure appointment per Act and Regulations.

source.span_hint: it has appointed at least one debenture trustee

title: Debenture redemption reserve creation
text: it shall create a debenture redemption reserve in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules made thereunder;
notes: Map to reserve creation; ensure compliance with Act and rules.

source.span_hint: it shall create a debenture redemption reserve

title: Security requirements for convertible debt
text: if the issuer proposes to create a charge or security on its assets in respect of secured convertible debt instruments, it shall ensure that:
notes: Main header for security conditions; map to asset security checks.

source.span_hint: if the issuer proposes to create a charge or security

title: Consent obtained for security charges
text: where security is already created on such assets in favour of any existing lender or security trustee or the issue of convertible debt instruments is proposed to be secured by creation of security on a leasehold land, the consent of such lender or security trustee or lessor for a second or pari passu charge has been obtained and submitted to the debenture trustee before the opening of the issue;
notes: Map to has_consent for security.

source.span_hint: where security is already created

title: No default in debt payments for more than 6 months
text: Provided that it is not in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount in respect of debt instruments issued by it to the public, if any, for a period of more than six months.
notes: Map to no_default_in_debt.

source.span_hint: Provided that it is not in default

title: Security cover after reduction of prior liabilities
text: the security or asset cover shall be arrived at after reduction of the liabilities having a first or prior charge, in case the convertible debt instruments are secured by a second or subsequent charge.
notes: Map to security_cover_calculation.

source.span_hint: the security or asset cover shall be arrived at

title: Conversion requires explicit consent from holders
text: The issuer shall not convert its optionally convertible debt instruments into equity shares unless the holders of such convertible debt instruments have sent their positive consent to the issuer and non-receipt of reply to any notice sent by the issuer for this purpose shall not be construed as consent for conversion of any convertible debt instruments.
notes: Map to requires_consent_from_holders.

source.span_hint: The issuer shall not convert

title: Option to not convert if value > ₹10 cr and price not set
text: Where the value of the convertible portion of any listed convertible debt instruments issued by an issuer exceeds ten crore rupees and the issuer has not determined the conversion price of such convertible debt instruments at the time of making the issue, the holders of such convertible debt instruments shall be given the option of not converting the convertible portion into equity shares: Provided that where the upper limit on the price and justification is determined and disclosed, it shall not be necessary to give such option.
notes: Map to conversion_option if value > 10cr.

source.span_hint: Where the value of the convertible portion

title: Redeem unconverted debt at face value within one month
text: Where an option is to be given to the holders of the convertible debt instruments in terms of sub-regulation (2) and if one or more of such holders do not exercise the option to convert the instruments into equity share capital at a price determined in the general meeting of the shareholders, the issuer shall redeem that part of the instruments within one month from the last date by which option is to be exercised, at a price which shall not be less than its face value.
notes: Map to redemption_mechanism for unconverted.

source.span_hint: Where an option is to be given

title: Exception if redemption disclosed
text: The provision of sub-regulation (2) shall not apply if such redemption is as per the disclosures made in the offer document.
notes: Does not apply if redemption is disclosed.

source.span_hint: The provision of sub-regulation (2) shall not apply

title: Restriction on issuing convertible debt for promoter-related purposes
text: An issuer shall not issue convertible debt instruments for financing or for providing loans to or for acquiring shares of any person who is part of the promoter group or group companies:
notes: Map to no_issuance_for_promoter.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall not issue

title: Eligibility for fully convertible debt with short conversion period
text: Provided that an issuer shall be eligible to issue fully convertible debt instruments for these purposes if the period of conversion of such debt instruments is less than eighteen months from the date of issue of such debt instruments.
notes: Map to conversion_period < 18 months for fully convertible.

source.span_hint: Provided that an issuer shall be eligible

title: Eligible to issue fully convertible debt if conversion period < 18 months
text: an issuer shall be eligible to issue fully convertible debt instruments for these purposes if the period of conversion of such debt instruments is less than eighteen months from the date of issue of such debt instruments.
notes: Carve-out for fully convertible debt with short conversion period.

source.span_hint: an issuer shall be eligible to issue

title: Eligibility to issue warrants with conditions
text: An issuer shall be eligible to issue warrants in an initial public offer subject to the following:
notes: Warrants can be issued with specified conditions.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall be eligible to issue

title: Warrants tenure ≤ 18 months
text: the tenure of such warrants shall not exceed eighteen months from the date of their allotment in the initial public offer;
notes: Warrants must be redeemed or expire within 18 months.

source.span_hint: the tenure of such warrants shall not exceed

title: Warrant exercise price and consideration upfront
text: the price or formula for determination of exercise price of the warrants shall be determined upfront and disclosed in the offer document and at least twenty-five per cent. of the consideration amount based on the exercise price shall also be received upfront;
notes: Map to exercise_price_disclosure and upfront_consideration (25%).

source.span_hint: the price or formula for determination of exercise price of the warrants shall be determined

title: Upfront payment for formula-based exercise price
text: in case the exercise price of warrants is based on a formula, twenty-five per cent. consideration amount based on the cap price of the price band determined for the linked equity shares or convertible securities shall be received upfront.
notes: Specific requirement for formula-based pricing.

source.span_hint: in case the exercise price of warrants is based on a formula

title: Forfeiture of unexercised warrants consideration
text: in case the warrant holder does not exercise the option to take equity shares against any of the warrants held by the warrant holder, within three months from the date of payment of consideration, such consideration made in respect of such warrants shall be forfeited by the issuer.
notes: Consideration forfeited if warrants not exercised.

source.span_hint: in case the warrant holder does not exercise

title: Minimum promoters' post-issue capital
text: The promoters of the issuer shall hold at least twenty per cent. of the post-issue capital:
notes: Map to promoters_shareholding (minimum 20%).

source.span_hint: The promoters of the issuer shall hold at least twenty per cent.

title: Alternative entities can contribute to promoter shortfall
text: Provided that in case the post-issue shareholding of the promoters is less than twenty per cent., alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s) may contribute to meet the shortfall in minimum contribution as specified for the promoters, subject to a maximum of ten per cent. of the post-issue capital without being identified as promoter(s).
notes: Carve-out for shortfall contribution by other entities.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the post-issue shareholding

title: Ineligibility of securities allotted to certain parties
text: (c) specified securities allotted to the promoters and alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s) during the preceding one year at a price less than the issue price, against funds brought in by them during that period, in case of an issuer formed by conversion of one or more partnership firms or limited liability partnerships, where the partners of the erstwhile partnership firms or limited liability partnerships are the promoters of the issuer and there is no change in the management:
notes: Maps to ineligible securities for promoters, AIFs, etc., if allotted at discount; includes carve-out for no change in management.

source.span_hint: specified securities allotted to

title: Upfront consideration for formula-based warrants
text: Provided that in case the exercise price of warrants is based on a formula, twenty-five per cent. consideration amount based on the cap price of the price band determined for the linked equity shares or convertible securities shall be received upfront.
notes: Conditional on formula-based pricing; map to consideration requirement.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the exercise price

title: Promoters' contribution method
text: a) the promoters shall contribute twenty per cent. as stipulated in sub-regulation (1), either by way of equity shares or by way of subscription to convertible securities:
notes: Map to contribution_method (equity or convertible securities).

source.span_hint: the promoters shall contribute twenty per cent.

title: Equity share price disclosure for conversion
text: Provided that if the price of the equity shares allotted pursuant to conversion is not pre-determined and not disclosed in the offer document, the promoters shall contribute only by way of subscription to the convertible securities being issued in the public issue and shall undertake in writing to subscribe to the equity shares pursuant to conversion of such securities.
notes: Conditional on non-pre-determined equity share price; map to contribution constraint.

source.span_hint: Provided that if the price of the equity shares

title: Promoters' contribution price constraint
text: b) in case of any issue of convertible securities which are convertible or exchangeable on different dates and if the promoters’ contribution is by way of equity shares (conversion price being pre-determined), such contribution shall not be at a price lower than the weighted average price of the equity share capital arising out of conversion of such securities.
notes: Map to minimum_price_constraint for equity shares.

source.span_hint: in case of any issue of convertible securities

title: Minimum contribution for convertible debt offers
text: c) subject to the provisions of clause (a) and (b) above, in case of an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments without a prior public issue of equity shares, the promoters shall bring in a contribution of at least twenty per cent. of the project cost in the form of equity shares, subject to contributing at least twenty per cent. of the issue size from their own funds in the form of equity shares:
notes: Map to minimum_contribution (20% project cost) for debt instruments.

source.span_hint: subject to the provisions of clause (a) and (b) above

title: Stage-wise implementation for promoters' contribution
text: Provided that if the project is to be implemented in stages, the promoters’ contribution shall be with respect to total equity participation till the respective stage vis-à-vis the debt raised or proposed to be raised through the public issue.
notes: Conditional on phased implementation; map to stage-wise_contribution.

source.span_hint: Provided that if the project is to be implemented

title: Promoters satisfy requirements before IPO opening
text: The promoters shall satisfy the requirements of this regulation at least one day prior to the date of opening of the issue.
notes: Map to pre-IPO_requirement_satisfaction (at least one day before).

source.span_hint: The promoters shall satisfy the requirements

title: Escrow account for promoters' contribution
text: In case the promoters have to subscribe to equity shares or convertible securities towards minimum promoters’ contribution, the amount of promoters’ contribution shall be kept in an escrow account with a scheduled commercial bank, which shall be released to the issuer along with the release of the issue proceeds:
notes: Map to escrow_account_mandatory for contributions.

source.span_hint: In case the promoters have to subscribe

title: Cash flow statement for utilised contributions
text: Provided that where the promoters’ contribution has already been brought in and utilised, the issuer shall give the cash flow statement disclosing the use of such funds in the offer document;
notes: Conditional on pre-utilisation; map to disclosure_requirement.

source.span_hint: Provided that where the promoters’ contribution has already been brought in

title: Minimum contribution requirement for large offers
text: Provided further that where the minimum promoters’ contribution is more than one hundred crore rupees and the initial public offer is for partly paid shares, the promoters shall bring in at least one hundred crore rupees before the date of opening of the issue and the remaining amount may be brought on a pro-rata basis before the calls are made to the public.
notes: Map to large_contribution_threshold (₹100 cr) and payment_timing.

source.span_hint: Provided further that where the minimum promoters’ contribution is more than one hundred crore rupees

title: Not eligible if acquired with non-cash consideration
text: specified securities acquired during the preceding three years, if these are: (i) acquired for consideration other than cash and revaluation of assets or capitalisation of intangible assets is involved in such transaction; or (ii) resulting from a bonus issue by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealised profits of the issuer or from bonus issue against equity shares which are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution;
notes: Check if securities are ineligible due to acquisition method or bonus origin.

source.reg: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution 15. (1)(a)
source.span_hint: specified securities acquired during the preceding three years

title: Not eligible if acquired at lower price by certain entities
text: specified securities acquired by the promoters and alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s), during the preceding one year at a price lower than the price at which specified securities are being offered to the public in the initial public offer:
notes: Ensure acquisition price is not lower than public offer price for specified entities.

source.reg: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution 15. (1)(b)
source.span_hint: specified securities acquired by the promoters

title: Ineligible if acquired for non-cash consideration with revaluation
text: acquired for consideration other than cash and revaluation of assets or capitalisation of intangible assets is involved in such transaction
notes: Map to ineligible if acquisition involves non-cash consideration and asset revaluation.

source.span_hint: acquired for consideration other than cash

title: Ineligible if from bonus issue with ineligible shares
text: resulting from a bonus issue by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealised profits of the issuer or from bonus issue against equity shares which are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution
notes: Map to ineligible if from bonus issues using certain reserves or ineligible shares.

source.span_hint: resulting from a bonus issue

title: Price adjustment for ineligible securities
text: Explanation.- For the purpose of this sub-regulation, it is clarified that the price per share for determining securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution, shall be determined, after adjusting the same for corporate actions such as share split, bonus issue, etc. undertaken by the issuer;
notes: Maps to price_per_share adjustment for corporate actions in minimum promoters' contribution calculation.

source.span_hint: For the purpose of this sub-regulation

title: Eligibility carve-out for securities against existing capital
text: Provided that specified securities allotted to the promoters against the capital existing in such firms for a period of more than one year on a continuous basis, shall be eligible;
notes: Carve-out allowing eligibility for securities against existing capital if held long-term.

source.span_hint: Provided that specified securities allotted

title: Lock-in period for minimum promoters' contribution
text: a) minimum promoters’ contribution including contribution made by alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s) referred to in proviso to sub-regulation (1) of regulation 14, shall be locked-in for a period of eighteen months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer:
notes: Lock-in period of 18 months for minimum promoters' contribution holders; maps to promoters' securities lock-in.

source.span_hint: minimum promoters’ contribution including contribution made

title: Carve-out for lock-in period if majority proceeds for capital expenditure
text: Provided that in case the majority of the issue proceeds excluding the portion of offer for sale is proposed to be utilized for capital expenditure, then the lock-in period shall be three years from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Carve-out extending lock-in to 3 years if majority proceeds for capital expenditure.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the majority

title: Lock-in period for excess promoters' holdings
text: b) promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Lock-in period of 6 months for excess promoter holdings; maps to excess securities lock-in.

source.span_hint: promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution

title: Definition of capital expenditure for lock-in
text: Explanation: For the purpose of this sub-regulation, “capital expenditure” shall include civil work, miscellaneous fixed assets, purchase of land, building and plant and machinery, etc. and repayment of existing loan(s) that may have been taken for the purpose of such capital expenditure.
notes: Defines capital expenditure to include specific items and loan repayments.

source.span_hint: For the purpose of this sub-regulation

title: Lock-in period for non-promoter securities
text: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer:
notes: Map to non_promoter_securities with lock-in period of 6 months.

source.reg: Lock-in of specified securities held by persons other than the promoters
source.span_hint: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in

title: Exception for employee stock options
text: equity shares allotted to employees, whether currently an employee or not, under an employee stock option or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation right scheme of the issuer prior to the initial public offer, if the issuer has made full disclosures with respect to such options or scheme in accordance with Part A of Schedule VI
notes: Carve-out for employee stock options with disclosure requirements.

source.span_hint: equity shares allotted to employees, whether currently an employee or not

title: Exception for employee stock option trust
text: equity shares held by an employee stock option trust or transferred to the employees by an employee stock option trust pursuant to exercise of options by the employees, whether currently employees or not, in accordance with the employee stock option plan or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation rights scheme
notes: Carve-out for equity shares held by employee stock option trust.

source.span_hint: equity shares held by an employee stock option trust or transferred to the employees

title: Exception for venture capital funds
text: equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund of category I or Category II or a foreign venture capital investor: Provided that such equity shares shall be locked-in for a period of at least six months from the date of purchase by the venture capital fund or alternative investment fund of Category I or Category II or foreign venture capital investor
notes: Carve-out for venture capital funds with lock-in period.

source.span_hint: equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund

title: Employee shares subject to specific lock-in provisions
text: the equity shares allotted to the employees shall be subject to the provisions of lock-in as specified under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021.
notes: Map to employee_shares following external lock-in regulations.

source.reg: Lock-in of specified securities held by persons other than the promoters
source.span_hint: the equity shares allotted to the employees shall be subject to

title: Calculation of lock-in period for converted securities
text: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted pursuant to conversion of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities, the holding period of such convertible securities as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of six months period and convertible securities shall be deemed to be fully paid-up, if the entire consideration payable thereon has been paid and no further consideration is payable at the time of their conversion.
notes: Map to how lock-in periods are calculated for converted securities.

source.reg: Lock-in of specified securities held by persons other than the promoters
source.span_hint: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted

title: Lock-in not applying to lent securities
text: The lock-in provisions shall not apply with respect to the specified securities lent to stabilising agent for the purpose of green shoe option, during the period starting from the date of lending and ending on the date on which they are returned to the lender in terms of sub-regulation (5) or (6) of regulation 57.
notes: Map to lock_in exceptions for lent securities.

source.span_hint: The lock-in provisions shall not apply

title: Lock-in resumes after return
text: Provided that the specified securities shall be locked-in for the remaining period from the date on which they are returned to the lender.
notes: Carve-out condition for lock-in resumption.

source.span_hint: Provided that the specified securities shall be locked-in

title: Inscription or recording of non-transferability
text: The certificates of specified securities which are subject to lock-in shall contain the inscription “non-transferable” and specify the lock-in period and in case such specified securities are dematerialised, the issuer shall ensure that the lock-in is recorded by the depository.
notes: Map to lock_in inscription requirements.

source.span_hint: The certificates of specified securities shall contain the inscription

title: Allowance of pledge for locked-in securities
text: Specified securities68[, except SR equity shares,] held by the promoters and locked-in may be pledged as a collateral security for a loan granted by a scheduled commercial bank or a public financial institution or a systemically important non-banking finance company or a housing finance company, subject to the following:
notes: Map to pledge eligibility for promoters' locked-in securities.

source.span_hint: Specified securities held by the promoters and locked-in may be pledged

title: Condition a for pledge
text: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (a) of regulation 16, the loan has been granted to the issuer company or its subsidiary(ies) for the purpose of financing one or more of the objects of the issue and pledge of specified securities is one of the terms of sanction of the loan;
notes: Map to loan purpose conditions.

source.span_hint: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (a) of regulation 16

title: Condition b for pledge
text: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (b) of regulation 16 and the pledge of specified securities is one of the terms of sanction of the loan.
notes: Map to loan sanction conditions.

source.span_hint: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (b) of regulation 16

title: Lock-in continues after pledge
text: Provided that such lock-in shall continue pursuant to the invocation of the pledge and such transferee shall not be eligible to transfer the specified securities till the lock-in period stipulated in these regulations has expired.
notes: Carve-out condition for lock-in persistence.

source.span_hint: Provided that such lock-in shall continue

title: Condition for lock-in end date if partly paid-up
text: If the specified securities which are subject to lock-in are partly paid-up and the amount called-up on such specified securities is less than the amount called-up on the specified securities issued to the public, the lock-in shall end only on the expiry of three years after such specified securities have become pari passu with the specified securities issued to the public.
notes: Map to lock_in_end_condition based on paid-up amount.

source.span_hint: if the specified securities which are subject to lock-in

title: Transferability of locked-in specified securities
text: Subject to the provisions of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, the specified securities69[, except SR equity shares,] held by the promoters and locked-in as per regulation 16, may be transferred to another promoter or any person of the promoter group or a new promoter and the specified securities held by persons other than the promoters and locked-in as per regulation 17, may be transferred to any other person holding the specified securities which are locked-in along with the securities proposed to be transferred.
notes: Map to transfer permissions for locked-in securities.

source.span_hint: the specified securities held by the promoters and locked-in as per regulation 16, may be transferred

title: Condition for continued lock-in upon transfer
text: Provided that the lock-in on such specified securities shall continue for the remaining period with the transferee and such transferee shall not be eligible to transfer them till the lock-in period stipulated in these regulations has expired.
notes: Map to lock-in continuation after transfer.

source.span_hint: Provided that the lock-in on such specified securities shall continue

title: Appointment of lead manager(s)
text: (1) The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers, which are registered with the Board, as lead manager(s) to the issue.
notes: Map to lead_manager appointment.

source.span_hint: The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers

title: Predetermination and disclosure of lead manager roles
text: (2) Where the issue is managed by more than one lead manager, the rights, obligations and responsibilities, relating inter alia to disclosures, allotment, refund and underwriting obligations, if any, of each lead manager shall be predetermined and be disclosed in the draft offer document and the offer document as specified in Schedule I.
notes: Map to lead_manager roles and disclosures.

source.span_hint: Where the issue is managed by more than one lead manager, the rights, obligations and responsibilities

title: Lead manager not to be associate of issuer
text: (3) At least one lead manager to the issue shall not be an associate (as defined under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Merchant Bankers) Regulations, 1992) of the issuer and if any of the lead manager is an associate of the issuer, it shall disclose itself as an associate of the issuer and its role shall be limited to marketing of the issue.
notes: Map to lead_manager association and disclosure.

source.span_hint: At least one lead manager to the issue shall not be an associate

title: Appointment of other intermediaries
text: (4) The issuer shall, in consultation with the lead manager(s), appoint other intermediaries which are registered with the Board after the lead manager(s) have independently assessed the capability of other intermediaries to carry out their obligations.
notes: Map to other_intermediaries appointment process.

source.span_hint: The issuer shall, in consultation with the lead manager(s), appoint other intermediaries

title: Agreement with lead manager(s) and other intermediaries
text: (5) The issuer shall enter into an agreement with the lead manager(s) in the format specified in Schedule II and enter into agreements with other intermediaries as required under the respective regulations applicable to the intermediary concerned: Provided that such agreements may include such other clauses as the issuer and the intermediaries may deem fit without diminishing or limiting in any way the liabilities and obligations of the lead
notes: Map to agreement formats and liability clauses.

source.span_hint: The issuer shall enter into an agreement with the lead manager(s) in the format specified in Schedule II

title: Agreements may include additional clauses
text: Provided that such agreements may include such other clauses as the issuer and the intermediaries may deem fit without diminishing or limiting in any way the liabilities and obligations of the lead
notes: Map to flexible agreement terms without reducing liabilities.

source.span_hint: Provided that such agreements may include
